summary: Completed testing of MANO Iteration 12 features: Admin Panel user management buttons (Baja/Activar/Cancelar/Plan selector) and Family Panel improvements (click on member card opens edit dialog). Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Superadmin login with rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com works correctly
POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/cancel-subscription - Cancel subscription works, downgrades to free
GET /api/family/dashboard - Returns members, alerts, stats, has_family_plan
POST /api/family/members - Add senior member with simplified mode works
GET /api/admin/users - Returns users list with expected fields
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab shows Baja/Activar/Cancelar buttons
Frontend: Admin Panel Users tab shows plan selector dropdown
Frontend: Family Panel - Click on member card opens edit dialog
Frontend: Family Panel - Add member dialog works
Frontend: Family Panel - No upgrade banner for enterprise/business plans
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Panel Users tab correctly shows action buttons: ⏸ Baja (deactivate), ✓ Activar (reactivate), ✕ Cancelar (cancel subscription)
Plan selector dropdown shows all available plans with tier badges (Bronce, Plata, Oro, Platino, Diamante, Élite)
Family Panel correctly hides upgrade banner for users with enterprise/business plans
Click on member card opens edit dialog with all fields (name, relationship, phone, email, is_senior, simplified_mode, alert_level)
Family member CRUD operations work correctly via API and UI
Superadmin cannot be deactivated (proper protection in place)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during backend tests (test_status_*, test_cancel_*, test_plan_*). Test family member 'Test Playwright Member' added via UI testing.

mocked_apis.banking_service: Banking integration is MOCKED - does not connect to real banks

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested. Admin Panel at /admin has Users tab with action buttons: Baja (deactivate), Activar (reactivate), Cancelar (cancel subscription), and plan selector dropdown. Family Panel at /family-admin allows clicking on member cards to open edit dialog. Enterprise/business users don't see upgrade banner. Superadmin credentials: rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com / ManoAdmin2025!. Existing family members: María García, Test Playwright Member.
